description.ko: 유기적 구조와 디지털 코드가 결합하여 데이터와 빛으로 맥동하는 생체 발광 식물들이 가득한 합성 생태계에 대한 매혹적인 탐구.
description.en: A mesmerizing exploration of a synthetic ecosystem where organic structures merge with digital code, creating bioluminescent flora that pulse with data and light.

prompt: A high-resolution cinematic shot of a futuristic digital forest named FLORA-9, glowing bioluminescent fiber-optic plants, translucent holographic flowers with circuit patterns, soft neon particles floating in the air, 8k, unreal engine 5 style, vibrant colors, macro photography of synthetic leaves.
